sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99250" key="sunanachrai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνανα-ξηραίνω</orth>, <sense id="n99250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dry up at the same time</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Med.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:12:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.12.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
